title: Phaeneilema rigidum
taxonomy: Phaeneilema rigidum is a species of flowering plant in the family Poaceae. It belongs to the genus Phaeneilema and is native to tropical Africa. The classification of Phaeneilema rigidum is further divided into its kingdom (Plantae), phylum (Anthophyta), and class (Liliopsida). As a member of the Poaceae family, it is closely related to other grasses. Phaeneilema rigidum is an important part of its ecosystem, providing food and shelter for various animals.

intro: Phaeneilema rigidum, also known as the rigid Phaeneilema, is a species of flowering plant in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The bioactive constituents of Phaeneilema rigidum include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and alkaloids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
